description: Rolled when a career Event roll results in 'Life Event'. Roll 2D.

2.title: Sickness or Injury
2.text: You are injured or become sick. Roll on the Injury Table.

3.title: Birth or Death
3.text: Someone close to you dies, like a friend or family member. Alternatively, someone close to you gives birth (or is born!). You are involved in some fashion (father or mother, relative, godparent, etc).

4.title: Ending of Relationship
4.text: A romantic relationship involving you ends. Badly. Gain a Rival or Enemy.

5.title: Improved Relationship
5.text: A romantic relationship involving you deepens, possibly leading to marriage or some other emotional commitment. Gain an Ally.

6.title: New Relationship
6.text: You become involved in a romantic relationship. Gain an Ally.

8.title: Betrayal
8.text: You are betrayed in some fashion by a friend. If you have any Contacts or Allies, convert one into a Rival or Enemy. Otherwise, gain a Rival or an Enemy.

9.title: Travel
9.text: You move to another world. You gain DM+2 to your next Qualification roll.

10.title: Good Fortune
10.text: Something good happens to you; you come into money unexpectedly, have a lifelong dream come true, get a book published or have some other stroke of good fortune. Gain DM+2 to any one Benefit roll.

11.title: Crime
11.text: You commit or are the victim (or are accused) of a crime. Lose one Benefit roll or take the Prisoner career in your next term.

12.title: Unusual Event
12.text: Something weird happens. Roll 1D on the Unusual Event sub-table.

sub_table.1: Psionics: You encounter a Psionic institute. You may immediately test your Psionic Strength and, if you qualify, take the Psion career in your next term.
sub_table.2: Aliens: You spend time among an alien race. Gain Science 1 and a Contact among an alien race.
sub_table.3: Alien Artefact: You have a strange and unusual device from an alien culture that is not normally available to humans.
sub_table.4: Amnesia: Something happened to you, but you do not know what it was.
sub_table.5: Contact with Government: You briefly came into contact with the highest echelons of the Imperium — an Archduke or the Emperor, perhaps, or Imperial intelligence.
sub_table.6: Ancient Technology: You have something older than the Imperium, or even something older than humanity.
